pullRequest.title: VULN-3250 dataSource: getActiveDataSourcesByUser check for mismatching userId - principal

nodes.body:
Super nit:
```suggestion
      authorizer.throwAuthorizationException("The principal used to make the request differs from the user ID in the request.")
```

I think it can be useful to have a default value to maintain backwards compatibility and convenience.
```suggestion
  override def throwAuthorizationException(message: String = "Your role does not authorize you to perform this action."): Unit =
```
